name: Shao Jun the silent blade

sheet.name: Shao Jun the silent blade
sheet.background_story:
Shao Jun the silent blade 

 born and raised in the den. 

educated and trained. 

ready to kill. 

one of the best in his age group, the young Shao knows no sympathy for anyone standing opposite of his blade...

CHEN himself has raised him,

Chen himself has sent young Shao to his biggest challenge yet.

To aid those worthless pilgrims in fighting a bigger evil then themselves...... 

a vile creature known as the headless.....

may he be victorious and return to battle 

Oct 10 2023

Shao after returning alive and unharmed from the battle with the headless decides he is ready and hungry from war.... 

Chen tells his disciple that he can join the upcoming Tournament if he so wishes too.. Shao with great honor takes Chens offer to fight a warrior of Chens oldest rival the one eye Julian. 

Shao gets ready for the battle, determined to win this tournament much like his mentor once did ...
